## Purpose

Stage-level programme aligned to engagement letter target **DA lodgement September 2026** and owner aspiration (occupation Christmas 2028). Activity durations are indicative until builder procurement.

| Stage | Start | Finish | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

| Activity | Target | Dependency |

| DA determination | Dec 2026 | Council assessment |

- Principal certifier appointment required before CC application (post DA).
